paper_title: One Embedder, Any Task: Instruction-Finetuned Text Embeddings

raw_extraction.innovation: Instruction-finetuning on a diverse collection of datasets (MEDI) combining symmetric and asymmetric tasks, improving generalization across tasks and domains.
raw_extraction.application: Text embeddings for retrieval, text similarity, clustering, classification, information retrieval, bitext mining, pair classification, semantic textual similarity (STS), and summarization.
raw_extraction.license: null (not explicitly stated in the paper)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Creating broadly applicable text embeddings that generalize across diverse tasks and unseen domains through instruction-finetuning.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction-finetuning on MEDI (Massive Embedding Dataset for Instruction tuning)
raw_extraction.paper_title: One Embedder, Any Task: Instruction-Finetuned Text Embeddings

raw_extraction.innovation: Instruction-finetuning on a diverse collection of datasets (MEDI) combining symmetric and asymmetric tasks, improving generalization across tasks and domains. Scaling up model size further enhances performance improvements due to increased capacity for handling varied instruction formats.
raw_extraction.application: Text embeddings for retrieval, text similarity, clustering, classification, information retrieval, bitext mining, pair classification, semantic textual similarity (STS), and summarization.
raw_extraction.license: null (not explicitly stated in the paper)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Creating broadly applicable text embeddings that generalize across diverse tasks and unseen domains through instruction-finetuning.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction-finetuning on MEDI (Massive Embedding Dataset for Instruction tuning)
raw_extraction.paper_title: One Embedder, Any Task: Instruction-Finetuned Text Embeddings

raw_extraction.innovation: Instruction-finetuning on a diverse collection of datasets (MEDI) combining symmetric and asymmetric tasks, improving generalization across tasks and domains. Demonstrates enhanced benefits from scaling up model size, showing improved performance due to greater capacity for processing complex instructions.
raw_extraction.application: Text embeddings for retrieval, text similarity, clustering, classification, information retrieval, bitext mining, pair classification, semantic textual similarity (STS), and summarization.
raw_extraction.license: null (not explicitly stated in the paper)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Creating broadly applicable text embeddings that generalize across diverse tasks and unseen domains through instruction-finetuning.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction-finetuning on MEDI (Massive Embedding Dataset for Instruction tuning)
raw_extraction.paper_title: One Embedder, Any Task: Instruction-Finetuned Text Embeddings

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces instruction-finetuned text embeddings that generalize across diverse NLP tasks through unified instruction tuning, enabling zero-shot performance on 1600+ tasks.
raw_extraction.application: Cross-task generalization for semantic search, clustering, retrieval, classification, and generation tasks; zero-shot learning across diverse domains including science, biology, medicine, and more.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (not explicitly stated, but no open-source license mentioned)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Creating a single, versatile text embedding model capable of performing well across a wide range of NLP tasks without task-specific fine-tuning.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction-finetuning on MEDI dataset (Multi-Evaluation Data Integration) with human feedback alignment
raw_extraction.extension: Unified instruction tuning framework enables zero-shot task generalization by leveraging declarative instructions across 1600+ NLP tasks.
raw_extraction.paper_title: One Embedder, Any Task: Instruction-Finetuned Text Embeddings

raw_extraction.innovation: Instruction-finetuning of text embeddings for multi-task generalization across diverse retrieval datasets, leveraging Super-Natural Instructions.
raw_extraction.application: Cross-domain retrieval, semantic search, question answering, document retrieval, clustering, and classification tasks.
raw_extraction.research_problem: General-purpose text embedding models capable of handling various retrieval tasks without task-specific tuning.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction-finetuning for retrieval tasks using Super-Natural Instructions
raw_extraction.paper_title: One Embedder, Any Task: Instruction-Finetuned Text Embeddings

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up instruction-finetuned text embeddings (1.5B parameters) achieving superior performance across multiple retrieval benchmarks compared to smaller variants.
raw_extraction.application: Cross-domain retrieval, semantic search, question answering, document retrieval, clustering, and classification tasks.
raw_extraction.research_problem: General-purpose text embedding models capable of handling various retrieval tasks without task-specific tuning.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction-finetuning for retrieval tasks using Super-Natural Instructions
raw_extraction.paper_title: One Embedder, Any Task: Instruction-Finetuned Text Embeddings
